channel.title: CritCircuit
channel.description: Original CritCircuit articles will appear here after they are written and published.

item.title: Sony’s Bungie Bet Shows How Lost AAA Gaming Has Become
item.description: A John Sullivan opinion piece on Sony, Bungie, Marathon, Steam charts, and why AAA gaming needs to go back to basics.

item.title: The Golden Age of Asmongold
item.description: A personal CritCircuit essay on Asmongold, Classic WoW, McConnell, Olympus 4, AdvertiseSP, and why that streaming era still feels unmatched.
